profile.metaDesc: Manage your personal details, agency identity, and security settings.

agencyNews.metaDesc: Stay updated with the latest news and announcements from Thai Akha Kitchen.

agencyRates.metaTitle: Contract Rates 2026 | Thai Akha Kitchen Partner Portal
agencyRates.metaDesc: View your confidential partner net rates and commission structure for 2026.
agencyRates.guaranteeDesc: Seasonal rates are locked for all contracts signed before March 2026. Any price adjustments will be notified 60 days in advance.
agencyRates.paymentDesc: Net rates are payable via monthly invoice. Payments should be settled within the first 5 working days of the following month.

agencyTerms.metaTitle: Partner Policies | Thai Akha Kitchen Partner Portal
agencyTerms.metaDesc: Review the official terms, cancellation policy, and invoicing rules for partner agencies.
agencyTerms.cancellationItem4: Guest sickness: Free with medical cert
agencyTerms.logisticsDesc: Guests must be ready in the hotel lobby 10 minutes before the scheduled pickup time. Drivers will wait a maximum of 15 minutes before proceeding with the route.
agencyTerms.invoicingDesc: Statements are issued on the 1st of each month. Any discrepancies must be reported within 48 hours. Delayed payments may result in temporary portal suspension.
agencyTerms.customContract: Need a custom contract for large group incentive tours? Contact operations at hello@tak.kitchen

agencyReservations.metaTitle: Reservations | Thai Akha Kitchen Partner Portal
agencyReservations.metaDesc: View and manage all bookings made through your agency account.

agencyAssets.socialMediaDesc: Pre-sized Vertical Stories and Posts for Instagram and Facebook.
agencyAssets.needHelpDesc: Looking for something specific or custom branding materials? Our marketing team is ready to assist.
